description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat, multi-level roof and a clean, minimalist design. The structure features large horizontal windows along the main facade, providing ample natural light and a strong connection to the outdoors. A prominent rectangular swimming pool extends from one side of the building, set on a raised platform that visually anchors the property. The exterior is finished in light, neutral tones, with smooth surfaces and sharp geometric lines. The building sits on a flat base, with no visible porch or veranda, and the overall layout emphasizes open, functional living spaces. The architectural style is distinctly contemporary, with an emphasis on simplicity and integration with the surrounding environment.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large horizontal windows and a prominent rectangular swimming pool on a raised platform. The design is minimalist, with clean lines and light-colored surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with large windows and the attached rectangular swimming pool on the left.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the flat roof and the back of the bungalow, with the pool visible in the background.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the elongated structure, flat roof, and the pool extending from the right side.
description_view_3: Angled view from the pool side, showing the main entrance area and the relationship between the pool and the living spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large horizontal windows on the main facade
